PALO Operationalization Explorer - Third-Party Notices

The local file 3d-force-graph.min.js is the official browser distribution from:
3d-force-graph 1.80.0, Copyright Vasco Asturiano, MIT License
https://github.com/vasturiano/3d-force-graph

The distribution is self-contained and bundles runtime code from its dependency
tree. Direct bundled dependency ranges declared by 3d-force-graph 1.80.0 are:

- Three.js >=0.179 <1, Copyright three.js authors, MIT License
  https://github.com/mrdoob/three.js
- three-forcegraph 1.x, Copyright Vasco Asturiano, MIT License
  https://github.com/vasturiano/three-forcegraph
- three-render-objects ^1.41, Copyright Vasco Asturiano, MIT License
  https://github.com/vasturiano/three-render-objects
- accessor-fn 1.x, Copyright Vasco Asturiano, MIT License
  https://github.com/vasturiano/accessor-fn
- kapsule ^1.16, Copyright Vasco Asturiano, MIT License
  https://github.com/vasturiano/kapsule

The dependency tree also includes open-source packages used by three-forcegraph
and three-render-objects, including D3 modules, ngraph modules, tinycolor2,
Tween.js, float-tooltip and polished. These components are distributed under
their respective permissive open-source licenses. The official minified bundle
is preserved unchanged. Package acquisition and integrity details are recorded
in versions.json. The top-level 3d-force-graph MIT license is preserved in the
adjacent LICENSE file.
